titleStmt.title: SII 27.409: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 409. (A.R. No. 543 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the compound wall of a private house near the tank called ‘Hosakere’
This damaged record is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Vaiśākha, the other details being lost. The year corresponds to 1513-14 A.D.
It registers a gift of land, the boundaries of which are given; but the details are all lost. It refers to the rule of some king bearing the tiles rājādhirāja and paramēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādipateyēṁnamaḥ . śrī sarasvatyē namaḥ . śrī gurubhyō namaḥ .
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana sa khavaruśa 1425 śrīmakha saṁvatsara vai
śākha U śrīmanmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
badly damaged-worn out
kayyalu mūlavako mūḍaṇa kēriya va
bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu ya bāḷina Aṁcu
gaḍi Uḍuvalu bāḷi
na Aṁcugaḍi na bāḷina Aṁcuga
ḍi yi nālkugaḍi yoḷagaṇa gade hā 2 Ubhayaṁ mu
ḍe kaṁcihā Amu 12
bāḷige keya baḷiyavarakaya
koṁḍagade �keya ḷi ya huliya
ḍiya gadege mūḍalu gāvaṇiya baḷiyadara hittalu
bāḷugaḍi teṁkalu gōpaṇaseṭṭiya bāḷina Aṁcu
gaḍi paḍuvalu harida haḷlagaḍi baḍagalu sēnēsvara dēvaradē
vasya baṁkēśvaradēvara dēvasvada bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi �yo nā
lkugaḍiyiṁdoḷage gade ha 40 lu mu 2 . ge kaṭṭidateṟu gēṇi
Akki kaṁci hā 40 lu mu 9 yi bāḷige kaṭṭidateṟu ga 1 . 0 . =
maṭhada bāgilagaddegaḍi mūḍalu mosarōgarada bāḷina
Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu beṁma sāvaṁttana mūlada bā
ḷina Aṁcugaḍi paḍuvalu baḍagalu harida haḷagaḍi
yi gaḍiyoḷage gade nā hā 30 kaṭṭida gēṇikaṁ hā
40 llu mu 2 teṟu kāu jēpitadalli Uttāra

durggaṇa kocana kayyalu koṁḍamūla kaṟe ga
dde mūḍalu ṁdamaseṭṭiya Aḷiyaviśuseṭṭiya bāḷina A
ṁcu gadeteṁkalu harida tōḍugaḍi paḍuvalu kaṭṭu bāgi
lagadde Aṁcugaḍi baḍagalu saṁku sēnabōyitiya bāḷina A
ṁcugaḍi gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gade mu 9 ge gēṇi Akki kaṁcina
hā 40 U mu 4 teṟu ga yeḍetoṟeyoḷage māṇi
hebāra baladēvana kayyallikoṁḍa mūlavanu nāu mūla
va māḍikoṁḍa gaddege gaḍimūḍalu kēśavaṁṇana mūla
da bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu balurāḍiya kōṭasaṭi
Oṁma cuseṭṭiyavara bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi paḍuvalu narsa
Aṁṇana bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi baḍagalu madhyastara bāḷina A
ṁcu gaḍi yigaḍiyiṁdoḷage gaddeha 40 U mu 2 . yi bā
ḷiga gēṇi Akki kaṁ hā 40 lu yi mu 7 yi bāḷige teṟuga Þ 4
01 mattaṁ dayādyanāraṇa kayyali koṁḍamūla mūḍa
lu yidakoṟeya madhyastara rāsiya bāḷina Aṁccu
gaḍi teṁkalu hebārana mūlada bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi pa
ḍuvalu maṁṇeya nāraṇanamūlada bāḷinadē
ṭa gaḍi baḍagalu hiriyagarada kaṁṭadavotina hedu
gaḍi yi gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gadde mu 1 . yoḷige gēṇi Akki
kaṁ ha 40 llu mu 4 yidake teṟu gaṁ Þ3 . Ubhaya
ṁ gadde mu 12 ge kaṭṭidagēṇi Aki mu 40 yidakke teṟuva
ga 2 . 2 . = mattaṁ nāu halarakayyalu mūlavakoṁḍa gā
ḷappanāykana Agaradavottina baḍagaṇa bāḷina gēṇi Akki
yoḷage maṭhakke baha Akki kaṁ hā 40 lli mu 6 mataṁ kalla
keṟeya bayalalli lakumarasi beṁmiya saṁkuseṭṭi
yavara kayyalu mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷina gaḍiya vivara mūḍalu
yiru seṭṭiya sāgarada gaḍi teṁkkalu khasiya bāḷu gaḍi
paḍuvalu yirapasāvaṁtana bāḷugaḍi baḍagalu vijinātha
na bāḷugaḍi yi nālku catusīmevoḷagaṇa gade mu 20 mattaṁ
yidara Ottina gadeyagaḍi mūdalu gaḍiteṁka bastiya bāḷu
kalu sōṇaseṭṭiya bāḷu gaḍi paḍuvalu yiru seṭṭiyara ka
ḷigaḍi baḍagalu sōṇaseṭṭiya bāḷu gaḍi yinālku catussī
me Oḷagaṇa gade ha . Ubhayaṁ gade mu 2 . �yo bāḷi gēṇi Akki
kaṁ hā 40 lke mu 5 teṟugaṁ 1 . dānapālanayō madhyē dānā
śrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānasvarggamavāpnōti pālanaṁgaccu
taṁ pada �yo dharṁmake Ārobbaraḷipidare vāraṇāsi
yalli nūṟoṁdukavileya koṁda pāpa
Digital edition of SII 27.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
